welcome: 👋 Hello! Welcome to El Reducto. Type *MENU* to see our dishes.
help:
📋 *Commands*
• *MENU* - View menu
• *NUMBER* - Add dish
• *QUANTITY* - E.g., '3 coke'
• *ORDER* - View cart
• *REMOVE X* - Remove dish
• *CONFIRM* - Checkout
cart_empty:
🛒 *Empty cart*

Type *MENU* to see our dishes.
delivery_type:
🚚 *Delivery type*

• *1* - Pickup
• *2* - Home delivery

Choose an option:
payment_method:
💳 *Payment method*

• *1* - Cash
• *2* - Bank transfer

Choose an option:
order_confirmed:
✅ *ORDER CONFIRMED!*

📋 *Order #: {numero}*
💰 Total: {total} MAD
💳 Method: {metodo}
⏱️ Time: {tiempo}

🙏 Thank you for your purchase!

Type *HELLO* for a new order.
